alerts.title: Republican Lawmaker Plans to Add Prediction Markets to Congressional Stock Ban Bill
alerts.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil said he'll add language to the House congressional stock ban bill to cover prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi.
